title: Lots Of Create
description: A ModPack about Create with lots of addons.
body:
In this ModPack,\
you will enjoy the beauty of the amazing Create Mod along with many addons.

Create factories, railway stations,\
cool colonies along with power plants to supply them.

Here you can automate ***EVERYTHING*** you want,\
no need for boring manual work but, only to some extent to not just be sitting all day,\
which is also boring, is a possibility.

Features:

1. Automation
2. Trains (who doesn't like 'em)
3. Amazing terrain genaration
4. Shader compatibility

For any help or bug reports, join my discord using this link: https://discord.gg/C9b3anUaP9
